name: Do I really need a lawyer for my workplace fume lung claim or can I DIY?
description: Yes—lawyers boost payouts significantly on contingency.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I really need a lawyer for my workplace fume lung claim or can I DIY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—lawyers boost payouts significantly on contingency.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, hire one**—lawyers increase settlements 2-3x and handle denials/paperwork for free upfront (contingency fee).[1]

DIY risks lowballs or misses deadlines; pros know Utah nuances.[2]

**Key factors:**
- Complex causation proof
- Insurance tactics
- Hearing advocacy

**Practical guidance:** Free consults available; choose workers' comp specialists.
Don't risk benefits alone.
